payload.answer: The article at 'https://example.com/missing' could not be retrieved due to a 404 error. No content was ingested.

memory_cards.statement: Failed to fetch article at URL 'https://example.com/missing' due to a 404 network error.

details: HTTP 404 error encountered during fetch attempt.
No durable memory created for missing resource.

repair_options: Verify URL correctness and retry fetch.
Check network connectivity or proxy settings.
